title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your organization's structure, data policies, and system preferences.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Customize your workspace to fit your needs.

language.title: Language & Region
language.subtitle: Manage your interface language and regional settings
language.description: Select the language you want to use for the user interface. This setting will be saved to your browser.

export.title: Data Export
export.description: Export your employee data and payroll reports in various formats.

payslips.title: Payslips (PDF)
payslips.desc: Generate printable payslips for all employees for the current month.

csv.title: Raw Data (CSV)
csv.desc: Export raw employee and payroll data for external analysis.

excel.title: Excel Report
excel.desc: Detailed payroll report formatted for Microsoft Excel.

import.title: Data Import
import.description: Import employee data from CSV files.

dropzone.title: Click to upload or drag and drop
dropzone.subtitle: CSV files only (max. 10MB)
